# FP Talent

> The technical talent agency for software companies. End-to-end searches for product, engineering, data & AI, and leadership roles: JD co-writing, direct sourcing beyond job boards, psychometric screening and culture mapping included at no extra cost, structured technical and cultural panels, and offer management. Results across engagements: -29% time-to-hire on mid-to-senior roles, 82% of placed candidates still in seat at 12 months, 9 days median from first call to first founder interview. Based in New York, NY. Contact: mark@fptalent.io.

FPT works with founder-led software companies from seed to Series B. Every shortlist is psychometrically screened before the client meets a candidate. Client references are shared privately during consultations.

## Practices

- [Hire Product Managers](https://www.fptalent.io/practices/product/): product managers, senior PMs, group PMs, founding PMs, product ops
- [Hire Software Engineers](https://www.fptalent.io/practices/engineering/): full-stack, backend, frontend, founding engineers, DevOps and platform
- [Hire Data Scientists & AI Engineers](https://www.fptalent.io/practices/data-ai/): data scientists, ML engineers, AI engineers, analytics engineers
- [CTO, CPO & Engineering Leadership Search](https://www.fptalent.io/practices/leadership/): CTOs, VPs of engineering, CPOs, heads of product, heads of data, confidential searches

## Insights

- [Insights hub](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/): 36 articles on technical hiring across six categories: hiring playbooks, hiring science, comparisons and alternatives, choosing a partner, leadership hiring, pricing and fees
- [What technical recruiting agencies really charge, and why](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/what-recruiting-agencies-charge/)
- [Retained vs contingency recruiting for engineering](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/retained-vs-contingency/)
- [Why psychometric screening cuts mis-hires](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/psychometric-screening-mis-hires/)
- [Time-to-hire benchmarks for senior engineering roles](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/time-to-hire-benchmarks/)
- [12 questions to ask a recruiting agency before you sign](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/questions-for-recruiting-agency/)
- [Hiring your first PM](https://www.fptalent.io/insights/hiring-your-first-pm/)

## Contact

- [Book a consultation](https://www.fptalent.io/#contact): short form (name, work email, company)
- Email: mark@fptalent.io

## Candidates

- [Work with FPT on your next role](https://www.fptalent.io/candidates/): product, engineering, data & AI, and leadership roles at founder-led software companies, seed to Series B. Free for candidates; the hiring company pays.
